label: Battery Export Calculator
info:
Calculates optimal export strategy for the evening peak feed-in period.
Polls sensors every 60s, joins data, runs calculation function, and writes results
to HA helper entities consumed by the Peak Export Control automation.

REPLACE the server node ID (YOUR_HA_SERVER_NODE_ID) with your own HA server node ID.
All entity IDs marked with YOUR_ prefix must be replaced with your own.

name: Calculate Export Strategy
